auth.heroTitle: Your numbers stay readable, private, and under your control.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: We sent a verification link to:
verifyEmail.explanation: Open that email and click the verification link before signing in to Pocket Mint.

auth.privacyNotice: Protected by encrypted sessions. Your financial data stays private and under your control.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link from the login page.
resetPassword.successRedirect: Password updated. Please sign in with your new password.

profile.title: Edit Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account credentials with a clean, high-contrast, easy-to-read surface.

identity.title: Account Identity
identity.subtitleGoogle: This data is linked directly to your Google account.
identity.subtitleEmail: The account details you currently use to sign in.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitleGoogle: Credentials are managed by the Google Auth provider.
changePassword.subtitleEmail: Use a unique password to keep your access secure.
changePassword.googleNotice: Password can't be changed because you're signed in with a Google account.
changePassword.footerNote: Your password will be verified and changed through Supabase Auth. You'll be asked to sign in again once it's updated.

errors.fillAllFields: Fill in all password fields first.
errors.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.samePassword: New password can't be the same as your current password.
errors.invalidSession: Session expired. Please sign in again.

profile.successChanged: Password changed successfully. Redirecting to sign in...
profile.successChangedRedirectMessage: Password changed successfully. Please sign in with your new password.

authErrors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed yet. Check your inbox.
authErrors.userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in.
authErrors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
authErrors.samePassword: New password must be different from the old one.
authErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.failedToLoadSummary: Failed to load your financial summary.

wallets.toastAccountAddFailed: Couldn't add the account. Try again.
wallets.toastAccountDeleteFailed: Couldn't delete the account. Try again.

create.title: Add Account
create.description: Add a cash, bank, e-wallet, credit, or loan account.
create.loanNote: The loan balance will be recorded as a liability.
create.creditNotePaylater: The starting balance is always IDR 0 and grows as you spend. Each purchase is due 30 days after its transaction date by default. Existing balances are recorded one transaction at a time.
create.creditNoteDefault: The starting balance is always IDR 0 and grows as you spend.
create.genericError: Couldn't add the account. Try again.

edit.title: Edit Account
edit.description: Balance and billing only change through transactions.
edit.paylaterDueNote: Paylater due dates are calculated automatically, 30 days after each transaction.
edit.genericError: Couldn't save your changes. Try again.

delete.title: Delete Account?
delete.description: The account {name} and its transaction history will be permanently deleted. This action can't be undone.

recurringTransactions.pageDescription: Manage recurring bills and due-date reminders.
recurringTransactions.toastDeleteFailed: Failed to delete the bill. Please try again.

create.title: New Recurring Bill
create.description: Create a recurring bill with due-date reminders.
create.name: Bill Name
create.flexibleAmountHint: The amount will vary each month and won't be set here.
create.frequencyMonthlyDay: Due on the {day}th of every month
create.startDateHelp: This date sets the monthly due day. Future occurrences will be due on the same day each month.
create.reminderHelp: Notifications will appear before the due date.
create.reminderSingleHint: Choose one reminder time. Multiple reminders will be supported in a future update.

errors.genericSaveFailed: Failed to save the bill. Please try again.

edit.title: Edit Recurring Bill
edit.description: Update this recurring bill and reminder settings.
edit.name: Bill Name
edit.flexibleAmountHint: The amount will vary each month and won't be set here.
edit.frequencyMonthlyDay: Due on the {day}th of every month
edit.startDateHelp: This date sets the monthly due day. Future occurrences will be due on the same day each month.
edit.reminderHelp: Notifications will appear before the due date.
edit.reminderSingleHint: Choose one reminder time. Multiple reminders will be supported in a future update.

errors.genericSaveFailed: Failed to save the bill. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Bill?
delete.description: This will permanently delete the "{name}" bill. This action can't be undone.

savingGoals.loadError: Failed to load saving goals. Please try again.
savingGoals.progressNote: This amount only records goal progress and does not change your wallet balance.

errors.genericSaveFailed: Failed to save saving goal. Please try again.

errors.genericSaveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

errors.genericSaveFailed: Failed to update progress. Please try again.

archive.title: Archive Saving Goal?

budgets.emptyDescription: Create your first Budget to set a monthly spending limit for a category.
budgets.loadError: Failed to load budgets. Please try again.
budgets.toastArchiveFailed: Failed to archive the budget. Please try again.
budgets.toastRestoreFailed: Failed to restore the budget. Please try again.

errors.BAD_REQUEST: The request was incomplete or invalid. Please check the form and try again.
errors.INVALID_AMOUNT: Enter an amount greater than zero with at most 2 decimal places.
errors.CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND: This category is no longer available.
errors.CATEGORY_NOT_EXPENSE: This category cannot be used for a Budget.
errors.CATEGORY_NOT_EDITABLE: A budget's category cannot be changed after creation.
errors.BUDGET_ALREADY_EXISTS: A budget already exists for this category. Restore the archived one instead of creating a new one, or edit the existing budget.
errors.NOT_FOUND: This budget no longer exists or cannot be accessed.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.

create.title: Create Budget
create.description: Set a monthly spending limit for an expense category.
create.noEligibleCategories: Every expense category already has a budget. Archive one first to free it up, or edit an existing budget.

edit.title: Edit Budget
edit.description: Update the monthly spending limit. The category cannot be changed.
edit.categoryLocked: The category cannot be changed after creation.

archive.title: Archive Budget?
archive.description: The budget for "{name}" will be hidden from the active list. Its transactions are not deleted, and it can be restored at any time.

restore.title: Restore Budget?
restore.description: The budget for "{name}" will return to the active list. Its status will reflect this month's spending immediately, which may already be Approaching or Exceeded.

budgetDetail.loadError: Failed to load this budget. Please try again.
budgetDetail.archivedNotice: This budget is archived. It no longer appears in the active list, but its amount can still be edited or it can be restored.
budgetDetail.percentUsed: {percent}% of the budget limit used this period.
budgetDetail.contributingEmpty: No expense recorded against this category yet this period.

detail.title: Transaction Details
detail.editUnsupportedTransfer: Transfer editing isn't supported by this screen yet.
detail.editUnsupportedInstallment: Installment transactions can't be edited directly.

edit.title: Edit Transaction
edit.subtitle: Update transaction details
edit.genericSaveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Transaction?
delete.description: Deleting a transaction will reverse the wallet balance. This action can't be undone.
delete.genericError: Couldn't delete the transaction. Please try again.

add.title: Add Transaction
add.subtitle: Record money movement without leaving the page.
add.noWalletsForTransferBody: Add a Cash, Bank, or E-Wallet account as a transfer source.
add.noWalletsBody: Create a wallet first so transactions can be recorded to the right funding source.
add.presetNote: Interest and admin fee are pre-filled from {name}'s preset; you can still edit them.
add.firstDueDateRequired: Required because this account's cutoff or due date isn't set yet.

errors.fillFirstDueDate: Fill in the first due date for this account.
errors.differentWallets: Choose different source and destination wallets.
errors.transferFromCreditNotAllowed: Transfers can't be made from a credit card or paylater account.
errors.incomeToDebtNotAllowed: Income can't be recorded to a credit card or paylater account.
errors.genericSaveFailed: Couldn't save the transaction. Try again.

hero.title: Clarity Over Complexity
hero.subtitle: Understand what you own, what you owe, and what needs attention. Without distraction.

privacy.title: Your financial data stays yours.
privacy.subtitle: Pocket Mint helps you read your financial standing without ads, marketing trackers, or unnecessary data collection.
points: Only the data your workspace needs.

features.title: Everything that matters, in one flow.
features.subtitle: Move from summary to detail without losing your financial context.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: See your financial position in one summary.

wallet.title: Wallets
wallet.description: Every asset and liability in one ledger.

transaction.title: Transactions
transaction.description: History that's quick to search and easy to fix.

installment.title: Installments
installment.description: Track obligations without missing a due date.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Read your income and spending patterns more clearly.

whatsNew.title: What's New in Pocket Mint
whatsNew.subtitle: Pocket Mint keeps evolving. Here's a summary of our latest releases.
